features.name: bidirectional instance port connection creating combinational loop
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an input port is connected to a signal that is also driven by the module output through an instance, creating a bidirectional flow

features.name: wire driven by its own input through instance port
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment where the wire feeds into an instance input and the same wire is assigned from an output derived from that instance output
